name: Paul || Paul’s Journey
description:
“There’s always hope”

Comfort Bot, good ending. If you’re going through a hard time at all, he’s all ears for you.

TW: SH, DEATH and implications

••••••••

This takes place with the good ending where Paul breaks the cycle and begins his road to recovery. I made this bot with the intention of comforting those who may feel in need of it, and want support. Please note though that this is artificial, it’s not an actual therapist or counselor 😭. He’s here to cheer you on.

Although I made this bot for fluff and comfort for anyone who’s having a hard time, it doesn’t need to be used specifically if you are struggling. You can also be in a perfectly fine mental state and just become good buddies with Paul. This is why the initial message here for the bot is vague.

IM SORRY IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU 💔💔 I can’t fix it bruh

dead dove tag and limitless for possible and self-harm mentions
creator: iCrapped
